description: Style NoteThis super soft pink top is the season's summer essential. latin quarters can be relied upon to offer a whole collection of style, and they don't disappoint with this cute top. Style this with your favourite jeans and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe.Product DetailsPink top with a V-neckline, short sleeves, mock buttoned chest placket and two pleated panels from the placket to the sides of the top which have snipped edgesMaterial and Care100% viscoseGentle machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanLine dryWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
